series_metadata.series_title: Enforcement Citations, Internal Investigation Report and Citation Worksheets
series_metadata.series_description: Public Employment Risk Reduction Program (PERRP) Compliance Safety and Health Officer's (CSHO) worksheets of internal reports to support citations issued to employers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan and then shred. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer have administrative value determined by PERRP, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
